name: Welcome to Hisui!
description:
Hisui RPG
This bot only includes up to Obsidian Fieldlands since I couldn't fit the more into the Summary. Also, most of the Galaxy team members are not mentioned, nor is the plot COMPLETELY correct. If you want to meet a specific character, please mention the Character's name and title in your message.

PICK YOUR STARTERS!
-Cyndaquil
-Rowlet
-Oshawott

Explore, level up your mons, fight trainers and complete missions. Basically an endless RPG. Yes, you can grind till your mons are WAY over leveled too. I included evolution for two hisuian mons and the starters but it might not work.
No, this isn't fully canon. No, I cannot prevent Janitor ai from being weird. It's the best I can do, so... enjoy?
creator: ScarletWisp
